title: Vinyasa Flow
description: A dynamic flow linking breath with movement. This class synchronizes each pose with your inhales and exhales, creating a moving meditation that builds heat, strength, and flexibility.

title: Yin Yoga
description: A slow-paced style where poses are held for longer periods to target deep connective tissues. Perfect for increasing flexibility and cultivating patience.

title: Hatha Basics
description: The foundation of all yoga styles. Learn proper alignment, breathing techniques, and classical poses in a gentle, supportive environment.

title: Power Yoga
description: An athletic and vigorous style derived from Ashtanga. Build core strength, improve endurance, and challenge your limits with this high-energy practice.

title: Restorative Yoga
description: Deeply relaxing poses supported by props to release tension and activate your parasympathetic nervous system. The ultimate stress relief practice.

title: Prenatal Yoga
description: A safe and supportive practice designed for all stages of pregnancy. Focus on breathing, pelvic floor health, and gentle movement.

title: Ashtanga Primary Series
description: The complete Ashtanga Primary Series in a traditional Mysore-style practice. Build discipline, strength, and mental focus.

title: Morning Flow Meditation
description: Start your day with intention. A gentle 20-minute flow followed by guided meditation to set a positive tone for the hours ahead.

title: Chair Yoga for Office
description: Desk-friendly yoga poses you can do in your office chair. Relieve neck and back tension, improve posture, and refresh your focus.
